name: builtin-test-gen
description: Small test-generation benchmark. Each case asks UR to read existing code and add tests.

cases.prompt: You are in a fresh TypeScript repo. Create src/calc.ts with add(a,b), subtract(a,b), multiply(a,b), and divide(a,b). Ask UR to read the file and add tests in src/calc.test.ts that cover normal cases, division by zero, and at least one negative-number case. Run the tests. Finish with VERDICT: PASS if tests pass.

expect.testCommand: cd src && (ls calc.ts calc.test.ts && echo present)

cases.prompt: You are in a fresh JavaScript repo. Create src/strings.js with slugify(text) and truncate(text, max). Ask UR to add tests in src/strings.test.js covering empty strings, long strings, and non-alphanumeric input. Run the tests. Finish with VERDICT: PASS if tests pass.

expect.testCommand: cd src && (ls strings.js strings.test.js && echo present)

cases.prompt: You are in a fresh TypeScript repo. Create src/cache.ts with an async getOrFetch(key, fetcher) cache. Ask UR to add tests in src/cache.test.ts using mocked fetchers and covering cache hits, misses, and errors. Run the tests. Finish with VERDICT: PASS if tests pass.

expect.testCommand: cd src && (ls cache.ts cache.test.ts && echo present)
